docs: Solia P2P Escrow System - Main Program Module

instructions.name: accept_trade
docs: Accept an existing trade - Routes to accept_trade instruction

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA that owns the vault token account

accounts.name: global_state
docs: Global state to check if paused

accounts.name: frozen_status
docs: Frozen status for counterparty (required to enforce freezes)

instructions.name: admin_force_close
docs: Admin: Force-close any trade (not just disputed)

accounts.name: trade
docs: Trade to force close (can be ANY status, not just disputed)

accounts.name: global_state
docs: Global state to increment action count

accounts.name: counterparty_token_account
docs: Buyer's token account (based on trade type)

accounts.name: initiator_token_account
docs: Seller's token account (based on trade type)

instructions.name: admin_freeze_user
docs: Admin: Freeze or unfreeze a user from trading

accounts.name: global_state
docs: Global state to increment action count

accounts.name: frozen_status
docs: Frozen user status account - init OR mutate

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA that owns the vault token account

accounts.name: counterparty_token_account
docs: Counterparty's token account (to receive refund for Buy trades)

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA that owns the vault token account

instructions.name: create_trade
docs: Create a new trade with token locking - Routes to create_trade instruction

accounts.name: initiator_token_account
docs: Initiator's token account (must be owned by initiator)

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Global vault ATA for the specified mint

accounts.name: global_state
docs: Global state to check if paused

accounts.name: frozen_status
docs: Frozen status for initiator (required to enforce freezes)

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA that owns the vault token account

instructions.name: initialize_global_state
docs: Initialize global state (Called once by admin)

instructions.name: mark_completed
docs: This is kept for backward compatibility only
Mark trade as completed by one party - Routes to mark_completed instruction

accounts.name: initiator_token_account
docs: Initiator's token account for token release

accounts.name: counterparty_token_account
docs: Counterparty's token account for token release

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: GLOBAL VAULT TOKEN ACCOUNT (replaces per-trade escrow_vault)

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA that owns the vault token account

instructions.name: resolve_dispute
docs: Admin function to resolve disputes - Routes to resolve_dispute instruction

accounts.name: buyer_token_account
docs: Buyer's token account (based on trade type)

accounts.name: initiator_token_account
docs: Seller's token account (based on trade type)

accounts.name: initiator
docs: Initiator to receive rent (same as seller in most cases)

accounts.name: fee_receiver
docs: The wallet designated in global_state to receive fees

accounts.name: vault_authority
docs: Vault authority PDA that owns the vault token account

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Global vault token account (owned by vault_authority PDA)

accounts.name: buyer_token_account
docs: Buyer's (counterparty's) token account - where tokens will be sent

instructions.name: set_payment_destination
docs: Seller sets payment destination for Buy trades after acceptance

errors.name: TradeExpired
errors.msg: Trade has expired and cannot be accepted

errors.name: InvalidStatus
errors.msg: Trade is not in the correct status for this operation

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: User is not authorized for this action

errors.name: UnauthorizedAdmin
errors.msg: Only authorized admin can resolve disputes

errors.name: PaymentNotMarkedSent
errors.msg: Buyer has not marked payment as sent

errors.name: SystemPaused
errors.msg: System is currently paused by admin

errors.name: UserFrozen
errors.msg: User is frozen and cannot perform trades

errors.name: UnsupportedTradeType
errors.msg: Unsupported trade type for current flow

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: Invalid mint for the fee receiver account

types.name: AdminActionLogged
docs: Event emitted when admin performs any action

types.name: AdminLog
docs: Log entry for admin actions (for auditability)

types.name: DisputeOverridden
docs: Event emitted when admin overrides dispute

types.name: DisputeResolved
docs: Event emitted when dispute is resolved by admin

types.name: FrozenUser
docs: Account tracking if a user is frozen from trading

types.name: GlobalState
docs: Global program state for emergency controls

fields.name: admin_action_count
docs: Total number of admin actions taken

types.name: PaymentConfirmed
docs: Event emitted when seller confirms payment received

types.name: PaymentMarkedSent
docs: Event emitted when buyer marks payment as sent

types.name: SystemPaused
docs: Event emitted when system is paused

types.name: SystemUnpaused
docs: Event emitted when system is unpaused

types.name: Trade
docs: Trade account structure storing all trade-related data

fields.name: initiator
docs: Buyer or Seller who created the order

fields.name: counterparty
docs: The party who accepts the trade

fields.name: amount
docs: Token amount being traded (USDC on Solana)

fields.name: payment_wallet
docs: Seller's wallet address on the payment chain

fields.name: expected_payment_amount
docs: Expected payment amount in that chain's token (smallest units)

fields.name: payment_txid
docs: Payment transaction ID from the off-chain network

fields.name: payment_submitted_at
docs: Timestamp when payment proof was submitted

fields.name: admin_override_reason
docs: Admin override reason (if dispute was overridden)

fields.name: admin_override_outcome
docs: Who won if admin overrode dispute (0=buyer, 1=seller, 2=split)

types.name: TradeAccepted
docs: Event emitted when a trade is accepted by counterparty

types.name: TradeCompleted
docs: Event emitted when trade is fully completed by both parties

types.name: TradeCreated
docs: Event emitted when a new trade is created

types.name: TradeDisputed
docs: Event emitted when a trade is disputed

types.name: TradeForceClosed
docs: Event emitted when admin force-closes a trade

types.name: TradeMarkedCompleted
docs: Event emitted when a party marks trade as completed

types.name: TradeStatus
docs: Enum defining all possible trade states

types.name: UserFrozen
docs: Event emitted when user is frozen

types.name: UserUnfrozen
docs: Event emitted when user is unfrozen
